commands.review_summary:
The branch makes `sessions export-trajectory` resolve its implicit store through `getRuntimeConfig().session?.store` and `resolveStorePath`, updates help text, and adds command/resolver fallback tests.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +73. Total +74 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows export without `--store` uses the default agent store while sibling session commands resolve configured `session.store`; the linked issue and PR body also include configured-store reproduction/proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer approval of the compatibility-sensitive implicit CLI default change, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(cli): honor configured store for trajectory export
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #95568.

`openclaw sessions export-trajectory` ignored configured `session.store` when `--store` was omitted. That made the command inconsistent with `openclaw sessions` list/cleanup/tail behavior and could make trajectory export miss sessions stored under a configured or templated session store.

## Why This Change Was Made

The export command already knows the target agent id from `--agent` or the modern `agent:<id>:...` session key. It now resolves the implicit store through runtime config with `resolveStorePath(getRuntimeConfig().session?.store, { agentId })`, while preserving explicit `--store` as the highest-priority path.

The command help now matches the behavior by describing the default store as resolved from config.

## User Impact

Users with a custom `session.store`, including `{agentId}` templates, can run:

```bash
openclaw sessions export-trajectory --session-key "agent:work:telegram:direct:123"
```

without also passing `--store`, and the command will look in the same configured store path that session listing uses.

## Evidence

- `pnpm changed:lanes --json --base upstream/main`
- `pnpm test src/commands/export-trajectory.test.ts src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.test.ts src/config/sessions/targets.test.ts src/commands/sessions.default-agent-store.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs --changed upstream/main --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw sessions export-trajectory --help`
- Temporary-home CLI smoke on `28acb16b51`: configured `session.store` export succeeds without `--store`; explicit `--store` still overrides config.

```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
28acb16b51

$ cat <temp-config>
{
  "session": {
    "store": "<temp-root>/configured/{agentId}/sessions.json"
  }
}

$ node -e "print fixture session ids"
configured store: agent:work:telegram:direct:configured-proof -> configured-session
configured store: agent:work:telegram:direct:override-proof -> configured-override-session
default store: agent:work:telegram:direct:configured-proof -> default-session
explicit store: agent:work:telegram:direct:override-proof -> explicit-session

$ OPENCLAW_HOME=<temp-home> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<temp-config> pnpm openclaw sessions export-trajectory --session-key "agent:work:telegram:direct:configured-proof" --workspace <workspace> --output configured-proof
$ node scripts/run-node.mjs sessions export-trajectory --session-key agent:work:telegram:direct:configured-proof --workspace <workspace> --output configured-proof
✅ Trajectory exported!

📦 Bundle: .openclaw/trajectory-exports/configured-proof
🧵 Session: configured-session
📊 Events: 2
🧪 Runtime events: 0
📝 Transcript events: 2
📁 Files: manifest.json, events.jsonl, session-branch.json

$ OPENCLAW_HOME=<temp-home> OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=<temp-config> pnpm openclaw sessions export-trajectory --session-key "agent:work:telegram:direct:override-proof" --store <explicit-store> --workspace <workspace> --output explicit-proof
$ node scripts/run-node.mjs sessions export-trajectory --session-key agent:work:telegram:direct:override-proof --store <explicit-store> --workspace <workspace> --output explicit-proof
✅ Trajectory exported!

📦 Bundle: .openclaw/trajectory-exports/explicit-proof
🧵 Session: explicit-session
📊 Events: 2
🧪 Runtime events: 0
📝 Transcript events: 2
📁 Files: manifest.json, events.jsonl, session-branch.json

$ node -e "read exported manifest session ids"
configured-proof manifest sessionId: configured-session
explicit-proof manifest sessionId: explicit-session
```

- `pnpm format:check src/commands/export-trajectory.ts src/commands/export-trajectory.test.ts src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.ts`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm check:changed --base upstream/main`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main` clean

Note: I prepared the local Crabbox/Blacksmith tooling, but did not run remote Blacksmith Testbox proof because this machine's Blacksmith account is not authenticated. The local changed-check child mode above ran the same core/coreTests changed lanes successfully.
